tEn: Deep Double Descent: Where Bigger Models and More Data Hurt
tZh: 深度双重下降：更大的模型和更多的数据反而有害
sEn: Double descent shows that increasing model size or training epochs can first hurt then help performance, and more data can sometimes worsen test results.
sZh: 双重下降现象表明，增加模型大小或训练轮数会先降低后提升性能，而增加训练样本有时反而会损害测试表现。
absEn: We show that a variety of modern deep learning tasks exhibit a "double-descent" phenomenon where, as we increase model size, performance first gets worse and then gets better. Moreover, we show that double descent occurs not just as a function of model size, but also as a function of the number of training epochs. We unify the above phenomena by defining a new complexity measure we call the effective model complexity and conjecture a generalized double descent with respect to this measure. Furthermore, our notion of model complexity allows us to identify certain regimes where increasing (even quadrupling) the number of train samples actually hurts test performance.
absZh: 我们展示了多种现代深度学习任务存在“双重下降”现象：随着模型规模增大，性能先变差后变好。此外，双重下降不仅随模型规模变化，也随训练轮数变化。我们通过定义一种新的复杂度度量——有效模型复杂度，统一了上述现象，并推测了关于该度量的广义双重下降。此外，我们的模型复杂度概念使我们能够识别出某些增加（甚至翻两番）训练样本反而损害测试性能的区域。

contrib.en: Identifies double descent in modern deep learning tasks as model size increases.
contrib.zh: 识别出现代深度学习任务中随模型规模增大出现的双重下降现象。

contrib.en: Shows epoch-wise double descent where test error peaks then drops with training time.
contrib.zh: 展示了随训练时间增加，测试误差先升后降的逐轮双重下降。

contrib.en: Defines Effective Model Complexity (EMC) to unify model-wise and epoch-wise double descent.
contrib.zh: 定义有效模型复杂度（EMC）以统一模型级和逐轮双重下降。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that increasing training samples can hurt test performance in critical regimes.
contrib.zh: 证明在临界区间增加训练样本可能损害测试性能。

contrib.en: Provides extensive empirical validation across architectures, datasets, and optimizers.
contrib.zh: 跨架构、数据集和优化器提供了广泛的经验验证。

contrib.en: Reconciles classical bias-variance trade-off with modern overparameterized deep learning.
contrib.zh: 调和了经典偏差-方差权衡与现代过参数化深度学习。

limits.en: Double descent is most pronounced with label noise; less clear in noiseless settings.
limits.zh: 双重下降在标签噪声下最显著；无噪声设置中不太明显。

limits.en: Effective Model Complexity is defined heuristically with no principled choice of epsilon.
limits.zh: 有效模型复杂度是启发式定义的，缺乏epsilon的原则性选择。

limits.en: Theoretical understanding of double descent in deep networks remains incomplete.
limits.zh: 深度网络中双重下降的理论理解仍不完整。

limits.en: Optimal early stopping may mitigate double descent, but its interaction is not fully explored.
limits.zh: 最优早停可能缓解双重下降，但其相互作用尚未充分探索。

limits.en: Results are empirical; formal specification of 'sufficiently smaller/larger' is lacking.
limits.zh: 结果是经验性的；缺乏'充分小/大'的形式化规范。

items.en: We show that a variety of modern deep learning tasks exhibit a “double-descent” phenomenon where, as we increase model size, performance first gets worse and then gets better. Moreover, we show that double descent occurs not just as a function of model size, but also as a function of the number of training epochs. We unify the above phenomena by defining a new complexity measure we call the effective model complexity and conjecture a generalized double descent with respect to this measure. Furthermore, our notion of model complexity allows us to identify certain regimes where increasing (even quadrupling) the number of train samples actually hurts test performance.
items.zh: 我们展示了多种现代深度学习任务存在“双下降”现象：随着模型规模增大，性能先变差后变好。此外，我们表明双下降不仅随模型规模变化，也随训练轮次变化。我们通过定义一个新的复杂度度量——有效模型复杂度——来统一上述现象，并推测关于该度量的广义双下降。此外，我们的模型复杂度概念使我们能够识别某些增加（甚至翻两番）训练样本数量反而损害测试性能的区域。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Left: Train and test error as a function of model size, for ResNet18s of varying width on CIFAR-10 with 15% label noise. Right: Test error, shown for varying train epochs. All models trained using Adam for 4K epochs. The largest model (width 646464) corresponds to standard ResNet18.
items.capZh: 图1：左图：在CIFAR-10上使用15%标签噪声的变宽ResNet18，训练和测试误差随模型大小的变化。右图：测试误差随训练轮次的变化。所有模型使用Adam训练4000轮。最大模型（宽度64）对应标准ResNet18。

items.en: The bias-variance trade-off is a fundamental concept in classical statistical learning theory (e.g., Hastie et al. (2005)). The idea is that models of higher complexity have lower bias but higher variance. According to this theory, once model complexity passes a certain threshold, models “overfit” with the variance term dominating the test error, and hence from this point onward, increasing model complexity will only decrease performance (i.e., increase test error). Hence conventional wisdom in classical statistics is that, once we pass a certain threshold, “larger models are worse.”
items.zh: 偏差-方差权衡是经典统计学习理论中的一个基本概念（例如，Hastie等人，2005）。其思想是，复杂度越高的模型偏差越低但方差越高。根据这一理论，一旦模型复杂度超过某个阈值，模型就会“过拟合”，方差项主导测试误差，因此从这一点开始，增加模型复杂度只会降低性能（即增加测试误差）。因此，经典统计学的传统观点是，一旦超过某个阈值，“更大的模型更差”。

items.en: However, modern neural networks exhibit no such phenomenon. Such networks have millions of parameters, more than enough to fit even random labels (Zhang et al. (2016)), and yet they perform much better on many tasks than smaller models. Indeed, conventional wisdom among practitioners is that “larger models are better’’ (Krizhevsky et al. (2012), Huang et al. (2018), Szegedy et al. (2015), Radford et al. (2019)). The effect of training time on test performance is also up for debate. In some settings, “early stopping” improves test performance, while in other settings training neural networks to zero training error only improves performance. Finally, if there is one thing both classical statisticians and deep learning practitioners agree on is “more data is always better”.
items.zh: 然而，现代神经网络并未表现出这种现象。这些网络拥有数百万个参数，足以拟合甚至随机标签（Zhang等人，2016），但在许多任务上它们比小模型表现更好。实际上，从业者的传统观点是“更大的模型更好”（Krizhevsky等人，2012；Huang等人，2018；Szegedy等人，2015；Radford等人，2019）。训练时间对测试性能的影响也存在争议。在某些情况下，“早停”会提高测试性能，而在其他情况下，将神经网络训练到零训练误差只会提高性能。最后，如果说经典统计学家和深度学习从业者有一致意见的话，那就是“更多数据总是更好”。

items.en: In this paper, we present empirical evidence that both reconcile and challenge some of the above “conventional wisdoms.” We show that many deep learning settings have two different regimes. In the under-parameterized regime, where the model complexity is small compared to the number of samples, the test error as a function of model complexity follows the U-like behavior predicted by the classical bias/variance tradeoff. However, once model complexity is sufficiently large to interpolate i.e., achieve (close to) zero training error, then increasing complexity only decreases test error, following the modern intuition of “bigger models are better”. Similar behavior was previously observed in Opper (1995; 2001), Advani & Saxe (2017), Spigler et al. (2018), and Geiger et al. (2019b). This phenomenon was first postulated in generality by Belkin et al. (2018) who named it “double descent”, and demonstrated it for decision trees, random features, and 2-layer neural networks with ℓ2subscriptℓ2\ell_{2} loss, on a variety of learning tasks including MNIST and CIFAR-10.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们提供的经验证据既调和又挑战了上述一些“传统观点”。我们表明，许多深度学习设置有两个不同的阶段。在欠参数化阶段，模型复杂度相对于样本数量较小，测试误差随模型复杂度的变化遵循经典偏差/方差权衡预测的U形行为。然而，一旦模型复杂度足够大以实现插值（即达到接近零的训练误差），增加复杂度只会降低测试误差，遵循“更大模型更好”的现代直觉。类似的行为先前在Opper（1995；2001）、Advani & Saxe（2017）、Spigler等人（2018）和Geiger等人（2019b）中观察到。这一现象首先由Belkin等人（2018）普遍提出，并命名为“双下降”，并在决策树、随机特征和具有ℓ2损失的2层神经网络上，针对包括MNIST和CIFAR-10在内的多种学习任务进行了演示。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Left: Test error as a function of model size and train epochs. The horizontal line corresponds to model-wise double descent–varying model size while training for as long as possible. The vertical line corresponds to epoch-wise double descent, with test error undergoing double-descent as train time increases. Right Train error of the corresponding models. All models are Resnet18s trained on CIFAR-10 with 15% label noise, data-augmentation, and Adam for up to 4K epochs.
items.capZh: 图2：左图：测试误差随模型大小和训练轮次的变化。水平线对应模型维度的双下降——在尽可能长的训练时间内改变模型大小。垂直线对应轮次维度的双下降，测试误差随训练时间增加经历双下降。右图：对应模型的训练误差。所有模型均为在CIFAR-10上使用15%标签噪声、数据增强和Adam训练最多4000轮的ResNet18。

items.en: We show that double descent is a robust phenomenon that occurs in a variety of tasks, architectures, and optimization methods (see Figure 1 and Section 5; our experiments are summarized in Table A). Moreover, we propose a much more general notion of “double descent” that goes beyond varying the number of parameters. We define the effective model complexity (EMC) of a training procedure as the maximum number of samples on which it can achieve close to zero training error. The EMC depends not just on the data distribution and the architecture of the classifier but also on the training procedure—and in particular increasing training time will increase the EMC.
items.zh: 我们表明双下降是一种稳健的现象，出现在多种任务、架构和优化方法中（见图1和第5节；我们的实验总结在表A中）。此外，我们提出了一个更一般的“双下降”概念，超越了参数数量的变化。我们将训练过程的有效模型复杂度（EMC）定义为它能达到接近零训练误差的最大样本数量。EMC不仅取决于数据分布和分类器架构，还取决于训练过程——特别是增加训练时间会增加EMC。

items.en: We hypothesize that for many natural models and learning algorithms, double descent occurs as a function of the EMC. Indeed we observe “epoch-wise double descent” when we keep the model fixed and increase the training time, with performance following a classical U-like curve in the underfitting stage (when the EMC is smaller than the number of samples) and then improving with training time once the EMC is sufficiently larger than the number of samples (see Figure 2). As a corollary, early stopping only helps in the relatively narrow parameter regime of critically parameterized models.
items.zh: 我们假设，对于许多自然模型和学习算法，双下降作为EMC的函数发生。实际上，当我们保持模型固定并增加训练时间时，我们观察到“轮次维度的双下降”，在欠拟合阶段（当EMC小于样本数量时）性能遵循经典的U形曲线，然后一旦EMC足够大于样本数量，性能随训练时间提高（见图2）。作为推论，早停仅在临界参数化模型的相对狭窄参数区域中有帮助。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Test loss (per-token perplexity) as a function of Transformer model size (embedding dimension dm​o​d​e​lsubscript𝑑𝑚𝑜𝑑𝑒𝑙d_{model}) on language translation (IWSLT‘14 German-to-English). The curve for 18k samples is generally lower than the one for 4k samples, but also shifted to the right, since fitting 18k samples requires a larger model. Thus, for some models, the performance for 18k samples is worse than for 4k samples.
items.capZh: 图3：在语言翻译（IWSLT'14 德语到英语）上，测试损失（每词困惑度）随Transformer模型大小（嵌入维度d_model）的变化。18k样本的曲线通常低于4k样本的曲线，但也向右偏移，因为拟合18k样本需要更大的模型。因此，对于某些模型，18k样本的性能比4k样本更差。

items.en: Finally, our results shed light on test performance as a function of the number of train samples. Since the test error peaks around the point where EMC matches the number of samples (the transition from the under- to over-parameterization), increasing the number of samples has the effect of shifting this peak to the right. While in most settings increasing the number of samples decreases error, this shifting effect can sometimes result in a setting where more data is worse! For example, Figure 3 demonstrates cases in which increasing the number of samples by a factor of 4.54.54.5 results in worse test performance.
items.zh: 最后，我们的结果揭示了测试性能随训练样本数量的变化。由于测试误差在EMC与样本数量匹配的点（从欠参数化到过参数化的过渡）附近达到峰值，增加样本数量会将这个峰值向右移动。虽然在大多数情况下增加样本数量会降低误差，但这种偏移效应有时会导致更多数据反而更差的情况！例如，图3展示了将样本数量增加4.5倍导致测试性能变差的案例。

items.en: To state our hypothesis more precisely, we define the notion of effective model complexity. We define a training procedure 𝒯𝒯\mathcal{T} to be any procedure that takes as input a set S={(x1,y1),…,(xn,yn)}𝑆subscript𝑥1subscript𝑦1…subscript𝑥𝑛subscript𝑦𝑛S=\{(x_{1},y_{1}),\ldots,(x_{n},y_{n})\} of labeled training samples and outputs a classifier 𝒯​(S)𝒯𝑆\mathcal{T}(S) mapping data to labels. We define the effective model complexity of 𝒯𝒯\mathcal{T} (w.r.t. distribution 𝒟𝒟\mathcal{D}) to be the maximum number of samples n𝑛n on which 𝒯𝒯\mathcal{T} achieves on average ≈0absent0\approx 0 training error.
items.zh: 为了更精确地陈述我们的假设，我们定义了有效模型复杂度的概念。我们将训练过程𝒯定义为任何接受一组带标签的训练样本S={(x1,y1),…,(xn,yn)}并输出一个将数据映射到标签的分类器𝒯(S)的过程。我们定义𝒯的有效模型复杂度（相对于分布𝒟）为𝒯平均达到≈0训练误差的最大样本数量n。

items.en: The Effective Model Complexity (EMC) of a training procedure 𝒯𝒯\mathcal{T}, with respect to distribution 𝒟𝒟\mathcal{D} and parameter ϵ>0italic-ϵ0\epsilon>0, is defined as:
items.zh: 训练过程𝒯相对于分布𝒟和参数ϵ>0的有效模型复杂度（EMC）定义为：

items.en: where ErrorS​(M)subscriptError𝑆𝑀\mathrm{Error}_{S}(M) is the mean error of model M𝑀M on train samples S𝑆S.
items.zh: 其中Error_S(M)是模型M在训练样本S上的平均误差。

items.en: Our main hypothesis can be informally stated as follows:
items.zh: 我们的主要假设可以非正式地表述如下：

items.en: For any natural data distribution 𝒟𝒟\mathcal{D}, neural-network-based training procedure 𝒯𝒯\mathcal{T}, and small ϵ>0italic-ϵ0\epsilon>0, if we consider the task of predicting labels based on n𝑛n samples from 𝒟𝒟\mathcal{D} then:
items.zh: 对于任何自然数据分布𝒟、基于神经网络的训练过程𝒯和小ϵ>0，如果考虑基于来自𝒟的n个样本预测标签的任务，则：

items.en: If EMC𝒟,ϵ​(𝒯)subscriptEMC𝒟italic-ϵ𝒯\mathrm{EMC}_{\mathcal{D},\epsilon}(\mathcal{T}) is sufficiently smaller than n𝑛n, any perturbation of 𝒯𝒯\mathcal{T} that increases its effective complexity will decrease the test error.
items.zh: 如果EMC_{𝒟,ϵ}(𝒯)充分小于n，则任何增加𝒯有效复杂度的扰动都会降低测试误差。

items.en: If EMC𝒟,ϵ​(𝒯)subscriptEMC𝒟italic-ϵ𝒯\mathrm{EMC}_{\mathcal{D},\epsilon}(\mathcal{T}) is sufficiently larger than n𝑛n, any perturbation of 𝒯𝒯\mathcal{T} that increases its effective complexity will decrease the test error.
items.zh: 如果EMC_{𝒟,ϵ}(𝒯)充分大于n，则任何增加𝒯有效复杂度的扰动都会降低测试误差。

items.en: If EMC𝒟,ϵ​(𝒯)≈nsubscriptEMC𝒟italic-ϵ𝒯𝑛\mathrm{EMC}_{\mathcal{D},\epsilon}(\mathcal{T})\approx n, then a perturbation of 𝒯𝒯\mathcal{T} that increases its effective complexity might decrease or increase the test error.
items.zh: 如果EMC_{𝒟,ϵ}(𝒯)≈n，则增加𝒯有效复杂度的扰动可能降低或增加测试误差。

items.en: Hypothesis 1 is informal in several ways. We do not have a principled way to choose the parameter ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon (and currently heuristically use ϵ=0.1italic-ϵ0.1\epsilon=0.1). We also are yet to have a formal specification for “sufficiently smaller” and “sufficiently larger”. Our experiments suggest that there is a critical interval around the interpolation threshold when EMC𝒟,ϵ​(𝒯)=nsubscriptEMC𝒟italic-ϵ𝒯𝑛\mathrm{EMC}_{\mathcal{D},\epsilon}(\mathcal{T})=n: below and above this interval increasing complexity helps performance, while within this interval it may hurt performance. The width of the critical interval depends on both the distribution and the training procedure in ways we do not yet completely understand.
items.zh: 假设1在几个方面是非正式的。我们没有选择参数ϵ的原则性方法（目前启发式地使用ϵ=0.1）。我们也没有对“充分小”和“充分大”给出形式化规范。我们的实验表明，在EMC_{𝒟,ϵ}(𝒯)=n的插值阈值附近存在一个临界区间：低于和高于该区间，增加复杂度有助于性能，而在该区间内，增加复杂度可能损害性能。临界区间的宽度取决于分布和训练过程，我们尚未完全理解。

items.en: We believe Hypothesis 1 sheds light on the interaction between optimization algorithms, model size, and test performance and helps reconcile some of the competing intuitions about them. The main result of this paper is an experimental validation of Hypothesis 1 under a variety of settings, where we considered several natural choices of datasets, architectures, and optimization algorithms, and we changed the “interpolation threshold” by varying the number of model parameters, the length of training, the amount of label noise in the distribution, and the number of train samples.
items.zh: 我们相信假设1揭示了优化算法、模型大小和测试性能之间的相互作用，并有助于调和关于它们的一些相互竞争的直觉。本文的主要结果是在多种设置下对假设1的实验验证，其中我们考虑了数据集、架构和优化算法的几种自然选择，并通过改变模型参数数量、训练时长、分布中的标签噪声量以及训练样本数量来改变“插值阈值”。

items.en: Model-wise Double Descent. In Section 5, we study the test error of models of increasing size, for a fixed large number of optimization steps. We show that “model-wise double-descent” occurs for various modern datasets (CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, IWSLT‘14 de-en, with varying amounts of label noise), model architectures (CNNs, ResNets, Transformers), optimizers (SGD, Adam), number of train samples, and training procedures (data-augmentation, and regularization). Moreover, the peak in test error systematically occurs at the interpolation threshold. In particular, we demonstrate realistic settings in which bigger models are worse.
items.zh: 模型维度的双重下降。在第5节中，我们研究了在固定大量优化步数下，规模递增的模型的测试误差。我们表明，对于各种现代数据集（CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、IWSLT'14 德-英，带有不同数量的标签噪声）、模型架构（CNN、ResNet、Transformer）、优化器（SGD、Adam）、训练样本数量和训练过程（数据增强和正则化），都会出现“模型维度的双重下降”。此外，测试误差的峰值系统地出现在插值阈值处。特别地，我们展示了实际场景中更大的模型反而更差。

items.en: Epoch-wise Double Descent. In Section 6, we study the test error of a fixed, large architecture over the course of training. We demonstrate, in similar settings as above, a corresponding peak in test performance when models are trained just long enough to reach ≈0absent0~{}\approx 0 train error. The test error of a large model first decreases (at the beginning of training), then increases (around the critical regime), then decreases once more (at the end of training)—that is, training longer can correct overfitting.
items.zh: 周期维度的双重下降。在第6节中，我们研究了固定的大规模架构在训练过程中的测试误差。我们在类似设置下证明，当模型训练到刚好达到≈0训练误差时，测试性能会出现相应的峰值。大模型的测试误差首先下降（训练开始时），然后上升（临界区域附近），最后再次下降（训练结束时）——也就是说，更长时间的训练可以纠正过拟合。

items.en: Sample-wise Non-monotonicity. In Section 7, we study the test error of a fixed model and training procedure, for varying number of train samples. Consistent with our generalized double-descent hypothesis, we observe distinct test behavior in the “critical regime”, when the number of samples is near the maximum that the model can fit. This often manifests as a long plateau region, in which taking significantly more data might not help when training to completion (as is the case for CNNs on CIFAR-10). Moreover, we show settings (Transformers on IWSLT‘14 en-de), where this manifests as a peak—and for a fixed architecture and training procedure, more data actually hurts.
items.zh: 样本维度的非单调性。在第7节中，我们研究了固定模型和训练过程在不同训练样本数量下的测试误差。与我们广义的双重下降假设一致，我们在“临界区域”观察到不同的测试行为，此时样本数量接近模型能拟合的最大值。这通常表现为一个长平台区域，在此区域中，训练到完成时增加更多数据可能无济于事（如CIFAR-10上的CNN）。此外，我们展示了某些设置（IWSLT'14 英-德上的Transformer）中，这表现为一个峰值——对于固定的架构和训练过程，更多数据实际上有害。

items.en: Remarks on Label Noise. We observe all forms of double descent most strongly in settings with label noise in the train set (as is often the case when collecting train data in the real-world). However, we also show several realistic settings with a test-error peak even without label noise: ResNets (Figure 4(a)) and CNNs (Figure 20) on CIFAR-100; Transformers on IWSLT‘14 (Figure 8). Moreover, all our experiments demonstrate distinctly different test behavior in the critical regime— often manifesting as a “plateau” in the test error in the noiseless case which develops into a peak with added label noise. See Section 8 for further discussion.
items.zh: 关于标签噪声的评论。我们观察到所有形式的双重下降在训练集带有标签噪声（现实世界中收集训练数据时常见）的设置中最强烈。然而，我们也展示了几个即使没有标签噪声也存在测试误差峰值的实际设置：CIFAR-100上的ResNet（图4(a)）和CNN（图20）；IWSLT'14上的Transformer（图8）。此外，我们所有的实验都表明，在临界区域测试行为明显不同——在无噪声情况下通常表现为测试误差的“平台”，随着添加标签噪声而发展为峰值。进一步讨论见第8节。

items.en: Model-wise double descent was first proposed as a general phenomenon by Belkin et al. (2018). Similar behavior had been observed in Opper (1995; 2001), Advani & Saxe (2017), Spigler et al. (2018), and Geiger et al. (2019b). Subsequently, there has been a large body of work studying the double descent phenomenon. A growing list of papers that theoretically analyze it in the tractable setting of linear least squares regression includes Belkin et al. (2019); Hastie et al. (2019); Bartlett et al. (2019); Muthukumar et al. (2019); Bibas et al. (2019); Mitra (2019); Mei & Montanari (2019). Moreover, Geiger et al. (2019a) provide preliminary results for model-wise double descent in convolutional networks trained on CIFAR-10. Our work differs from the above papers in two crucial aspects: First, we extend the idea of double-descent beyond the number of parameters to incorporate the training procedure under a unified notion of “Effective Model Complexity”, leading to novel insights like epoch-wise double descent and sample non-monotonicity. The notion that increasing train time corresponds to increasing complexity was also presented in Nakkiran et al. (2019). Second, we provide an extensive and rigorous demonstration of double-descent for modern practices spanning a variety of architectures, datasets optimization procedures. An extended discussion of the related work is provided in Appendix C.
items.zh: 模型维度的双重下降最早由Belkin等人（2018）作为一般现象提出。类似行为在Opper（1995；2001）、Advani & Saxe（2017）、Spigler等人（2018）和Geiger等人（2019b）中也有观察到。随后，大量工作研究了双重下降现象。在可处理的线性最小二乘回归设置中对其进行理论分析的论文越来越多，包括Belkin等人（2019）；Hastie等人（2019）；Bartlett等人（2019）；Muthukumar等人（2019）；Bibas等人（2019）；Mitra（2019）；Mei & Montanari（2019）。此外，Geiger等人（2019a）提供了在CIFAR-10上训练的卷积网络中模型维度双重下降的初步结果。我们的工作与上述论文在两个关键方面不同：首先，我们将双重下降的思想从参数数量扩展到在统一概念“有效模型复杂度”下纳入训练过程，从而产生新的见解，如周期维度的双重下降和样本非单调性。训练时间增加对应复杂度增加的概念也在Nakkiran等人（2019）中提出。其次，我们提供了对现代实践（涵盖各种架构、数据集和优化过程）中双重下降的广泛而严格的证明。相关工作的扩展讨论见附录C。

items.en: We briefly describe the experimental setup here; full details are in Appendix B 111The raw data from our experiments are available at: https://gitlab.com/harvard-machine-learning/double-descent/tree/master. We consider three families of architectures: ResNets, standard CNNs, and Transformers. ResNets: We parameterize a family of ResNet18s (He et al. (2016)) by scaling the width (number of filters) of convolutional layers. Specifically, we use layer widths [k,2​k,4​k,8​k]𝑘2𝑘4𝑘8𝑘[k,2k,4k,8k] for varying k𝑘k. The standard ResNet18 corresponds to k=64𝑘64k=64. Standard CNNs: We consider a simple family of 5-layer CNNs, with 4 convolutional layers of widths [k,2​k,4​k,8​k]𝑘2𝑘4𝑘8𝑘[k,2k,4k,8k] for varying k𝑘k, and a fully-connected layer. For context, the CNN with width k=64𝑘64k=64, can reach over 90%percent9090\% test accuracy on CIFAR-10 with data-augmentation. Transformers: We consider the 6 layer encoder-decoder from Vaswani et al. (2017), as implemented by Ott et al. (2019). We scale the size of the network by modifying the embedding dimension dmodelsubscript𝑑modeld_{\text{model}}, and setting the width of the fully-connected layers proportionally (dff=4⋅dmodelsubscript𝑑ff⋅4subscript𝑑modeld_{\text{ff}}=4\cdot d_{\text{model}}). For ResNets and CNNs, we train with cross-entropy loss, and the following optimizers: (1) Adam with learning-rate 0.00010.00010.0001 for 4K epochs; (2) SGD with learning rate ∝1Tproportional-toabsent1𝑇\propto\frac{1}{\sqrt{T}} for 500K gradient steps. We train Transformers for 80K gradient steps, with 10% label smoothing and no drop-out.
items.zh: 我们在此简要描述实验设置；完整细节见附录B 1。我们考虑三类架构：ResNet、标准CNN和Transformer。ResNet：我们通过缩放卷积层的宽度（滤波器数量）来参数化ResNet18系列（He等人（2016））。具体地，我们使用层宽度[k,2k,4k,8k]，其中k变化。标准ResNet18对应k=64。标准CNN：我们考虑一个简单的5层CNN系列，包含4个卷积层，宽度为[k,2k,4k,8k]（k变化），以及一个全连接层。作为参考，宽度k=64的CNN在CIFAR-10上使用数据增强可以达到超过90%的测试准确率。Transformer：我们考虑Vaswani等人（2017）的6层编码器-解码器，由Ott等人（2019）实现。我们通过修改嵌入维度d_model来缩放网络大小，并成比例地设置全连接层的宽度（d_ff=4·d_model）。对于ResNet和CNN，我们使用交叉熵损失和以下优化器训练：（1）Adam，学习率0.0001，训练4K个周期；（2）SGD，学习率∝1/√T，进行500K个梯度步。我们训练Transformer进行80K个梯度步，使用10%标签平滑且无dropout。

items.en: In our experiments, label noise of probability p𝑝p refers to training on a samples which have the correct label with probability (1−p)1𝑝(1-p), and a uniformly random incorrect label otherwise (label noise is sampled only once and not per epoch). Figure 1 plots test error on the noisy distribution, while the remaining figures plot test error with respect to the clean distribution (the two curves are just linear rescaling of one another).
items.zh: 在我们的实验中，概率p的标签噪声指的是训练样本以概率(1-p)具有正确标签，否则为均匀随机错误标签（标签噪声仅采样一次，而非每个周期）。图1绘制了噪声分布上的测试误差，而其余图绘制了相对于干净分布的测试误差（两条曲线只是彼此的线性缩放）。

items.capEn: (a) CIFAR-100. There is a peak in test error even with no label noise.
items.capZh: (a) CIFAR-100。即使没有标签噪声，测试误差也存在峰值。

items.capEn: (b) CIFAR-10. There is a “plateau” in test error around the interpolation point with no label noise, which develops into a peak for added label noise.
items.capZh: (b) CIFAR-10。没有标签噪声时，测试误差在插值点附近出现“平台”，随着添加标签噪声发展为峰值。

items.en: In this section, we study the test error of models of increasing size, when training to completion (for a fixed large number of optimization steps). We demonstrate model-wise double descent across different architectures, datasets, optimizers, and training procedures. The critical region exhibits distinctly different test behavior around the interpolation point and there is often a peak in test error that becomes more prominent in settings with label noise.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们研究在训练完成（固定大量优化步数）时，规模递增的模型的测试误差。我们展示了跨不同架构、数据集、优化器和训练过程的模型维度双重下降。临界区域在插值点附近表现出明显不同的测试行为，并且通常存在测试误差峰值，在带有标签噪声的设置中更为突出。

items.en: For the experiments in this section (Figures 4, 5, 7, 7, 8), notice that all modifications which increase the interpolation threshold (such as adding label noise, using data augmentation, and increasing the number of train samples) also correspondingly shift the peak in test error towards larger models. Additional plots showing the early-stopping behavior of these models, and additional experiments showing double descent in settings with no label noise (e.g. Figure 19) are in Appendix E.2. We also observed model-wise double descent for adversarial training, with a prominent robust test error peak even in settings without label noise. See Figure 26 in Appendix E.2.
items.zh: 对于本节中的实验（图4、5、7、7、8），请注意，所有增加插值阈值的修改（如添加标签噪声、使用数据增强和增加训练样本数量）也相应地将测试误差峰值向更大模型移动。显示这些模型早停行为的额外图，以及显示无标签噪声设置中双重下降的额外实验（例如图19）见附录E.2。我们还观察到对抗训练中的模型维度双重下降，即使在无标签噪声设置中也有显著的鲁棒测试误差峰值。见图26（附录E.2）。

items.capEn: Figure 6: SGD vs. Adam. 5-Layer CNNs on CIFAR-10 with no label noise, and no data augmentation. Optimized using SGD for 500K gradient steps, and Adam for 4K epochs.
items.capZh: 图6：SGD vs. Adam。CIFAR-10上的5层CNN，无标签噪声，无数据增强。使用SGD优化500K个梯度步，使用Adam优化4K个周期。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Noiseless settings. 5-layer CNNs on CIFAR-100 with no label noise; note the peak in test error. Trained with SGD and no data augmentation. See Figure 20 for the early-stopping behavior of these models.
items.capZh: 图7：无噪声设置。CIFAR-100上的5层CNN，无标签噪声；注意测试误差的峰值。使用SGD训练，无数据增强。这些模型的早停行为见图20。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Transformers on language translation tasks: Multi-head-attention encoder-decoder Transformer model trained for 80k gradient steps with labeled smoothed cross-entropy loss on IWSLT‘14 German-to-English (160K sentences) and WMT‘14 English-to-French (subsampled to 200K sentences) dataset. Test loss is measured as per-token perplexity.
items.capZh: 图8：语言翻译任务上的Transformer：多头注意力编码器-解码器Transformer模型，在IWSLT'14德-英（16万句子）和WMT'14英-法（子采样至20万句子）数据集上训练80K个梯度步，使用标签平滑交叉熵损失。测试损失以每词困惑度衡量。

items.en: Fully understanding the mechanisms behind model-wise double descent in deep neural networks remains an important open question. However, an analog of model-wise double descent occurs even for linear models. A recent stream of theoretical works analyzes this setting (Bartlett et al. (2019); Muthukumar et al. (2019); Belkin et al. (2019); Mei & Montanari (2019); Hastie et al. (2019)). We believe similar mechanisms may be at work in deep neural networks.
items.zh: 完全理解深度神经网络中模型维度双重下降的机制仍然是一个重要的开放问题。然而，即使在线性模型中也会出现模型维度双重下降的类似现象。最近一系列理论工作分析了这一设置（Bartlett等人（2019）；Muthukumar等人（2019）；Belkin等人（2019）；Mei & Montanari（2019）；Hastie等人（2019））。我们相信类似的机制可能在深度神经网络中起作用。

items.en: Informally, our intuition is that for model-sizes at the interpolation threshold, there is effectively only one model that fits the train data and this interpolating model is very sensitive to noise in the train set and/or model mis-specification. That is, since the model is just barely able to fit the train data, forcing it to fit even slightly-noisy or mis-specified labels will destroy its global structure, and result in high test error. (See Figure 28 in the Appendix for an experiment demonstrating this noise sensitivity, by showing that ensembling helps significantly in the critically-parameterized regime). However for over-parameterized models, there are many interpolating models that fit the train set, and SGD is able to find one that “memorizes” (or “absorbs”) the noise while still performing well on the distribution.
items.zh: 非正式地，我们的直觉是，对于处于插值阈值的模型大小，实际上只有一个模型能拟合训练数据，并且这个插值模型对训练集中的噪声和/或模型错误指定非常敏感。也就是说，由于模型刚好能拟合训练数据，强制其拟合甚至略微有噪声或错误指定的标签将破坏其全局结构，并导致高测试误差。（参见附录图28，该实验通过展示集成在临界参数化区域显著有帮助，证明了这种噪声敏感性）。然而对于过参数化模型，存在许多拟合训练集的插值模型，SGD能够找到一个“记忆”（或“吸收”）噪声同时仍在分布上表现良好的模型。

items.en: The above intuition is theoretically justified for linear models. In general, this situation manifests even without label noise for linear models (Mei & Montanari (2019)), and occurs whenever there is model mis-specification between the structure of the true distribution and the model family. We believe this intuition extends to deep learning as well, and it is consistent with our experiments.
items.zh: 上述直觉在线性模型中有理论依据。一般来说，这种情况即使在线性模型中没有标签噪声也会出现（Mei & Montanari（2019）），并且每当真实分布的结构与模型族之间存在模型错误指定时就会发生。我们相信这种直觉也适用于深度学习，并且与我们的实验一致。

items.en: In this section, we demonstrate a novel form of double-descent with respect to training epochs, which is consistent with our unified view of effective model complexity (EMC) and the generalized double descent hypothesis. Increasing the train time increases the EMC—and thus a sufficiently large model transitions from under- to over-parameterized over the course of training.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们展示了一种关于训练周期的新型双重下降形式，这与我们统一的有效模型复杂度（EMC）视角和广义双重下降假设一致。增加训练时间会增加EMC——因此一个足够大的模型在训练过程中从欠参数化过渡到过参数化。

items.en: As illustrated in Figure 9, sufficiently large models can undergo a “double descent” behavior where test error first decreases then increases near the interpolation threshold, and then decreases again. In contrast, for “medium sized” models, for which training to completion will only barely reach ≈0absent0\approx 0 error, the test error as a function of training time will follow a classical U-like curve where it is better to stop early. Models that are too small to reach the approximation threshold will remain in the “under parameterized” regime where increasing train time monotonically decreases test error. Our experiments (Figure 10) show that many settings of dataset and architecture exhibit epoch-wise double descent, in the presence of label noise. Further, this phenomenon is robust across optimizer variations and learning rate schedules (see additional experiments in Appendix E.1). As in model-wise double descent, the test error peak is accentuated with label noise.
items.zh: 如图9所示，足够大的模型会表现出“双重下降”行为：测试误差先下降，在插值阈值附近上升，然后再次下降。相比之下，对于“中等大小”的模型，训练到完成时仅能勉强达到≈0误差，测试误差随训练时间呈经典U形曲线，提前停止效果更好。过小无法达到近似阈值的模型将停留在“欠参数化”区域，增加训练时间会单调降低测试误差。我们的实验（图10）表明，在存在标签噪声的情况下，许多数据集和架构设置都表现出逐轮双重下降。此外，这一现象在优化器变化和学习率调度中具有鲁棒性（见附录E.1的附加实验）。与模型级双重下降类似，测试误差峰值因标签噪声而加剧。

items.en: Conventional wisdom suggests that training is split into two phases: (1) In the first phase, the network learns a function with a small generalization gap (2) In the second phase, the network starts to over-fit the data leading to an increase in test error. Our experiments suggest that this is not the complete picture—in some regimes, the test error decreases again and may achieve a lower value at the end of training as compared to the first minimum (see Fig 10 for 10% label noise).
items.zh: 传统观点认为训练分为两个阶段：（1）第一阶段，网络学习一个泛化差距较小的函数；（2）第二阶段，网络开始过拟合数据，导致测试误差增加。我们的实验表明，这并非全貌——在某些情况下，测试误差会再次下降，并可能在训练结束时达到比第一个最小值更低的数值（见图10中10%标签噪声的情况）。

items.en: In this section, we investigate the effect of varying the number of train samples, for a fixed model and training procedure. Previously, in model-wise and epoch-wise double descent, we explored behavior in the critical regime, where EMC𝒟,ϵ​(𝒯)≈nsubscriptEMC𝒟italic-ϵ𝒯𝑛\mathrm{EMC}_{\mathcal{D},{\epsilon}}(\mathcal{T})\approx n, by varying the EMC. Here, we explore the critical regime by varying the number of train samples n𝑛n. By increasing n𝑛n, the same training procedure 𝒯𝒯\mathcal{T} can switch from being effectively over-parameterized to effectively under-parameterized.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们研究固定模型和训练过程时，改变训练样本数量的影响。之前，在模型级和逐轮双重下降中，我们通过改变EMC探索了临界状态（EMC𝒟,ϵ(𝒯)≈n）下的行为。这里，我们通过改变训练样本数量n来探索临界状态。通过增加n，相同的训练过程𝒯可以从有效过参数化转变为有效欠参数化。

items.en: We show that increasing the number of samples has two different effects on the test error vs. model complexity graph. On the one hand, (as expected) increasing the number of samples shrinks the area under the curve. On the other hand, increasing the number of samples also has the effect of “shifting the curve to the right” and increasing the model complexity at which test error peaks.
items.zh: 我们表明，增加样本数量对测试误差与模型复杂度图有两种不同影响。一方面，（如预期）增加样本数量会缩小曲线下面积。另一方面，增加样本数量也会“将曲线向右移动”，并增加测试误差峰值处的模型复杂度。

items.capEn: (a) Model-wise double descent for 5-layer CNNs on CIFAR-10, for varying dataset sizes. Top: There is a range of model sizes (shaded green) where training on 2×2\times more samples does not improve test error. Bottom: There is a range of model sizes (shaded red) where training on 4×4\times more samples does not improve test error.
items.capZh: (a) CIFAR-10上5层CNN的模型级双重下降，数据集大小变化。上图：存在一个模型大小范围（绿色阴影），其中训练2×更多样本不会改善测试误差。下图：存在一个模型大小范围（红色阴影），其中训练4×更多样本不会改善测试误差。

items.capEn: (b) Sample-wise non-monotonicity. Test loss (per-word perplexity) as a function of number of train samples, for two transformer models trained to completion on IWSLT’14. For both model sizes, there is a regime where more samples hurt performance. Compare to Figure 3, of model-wise double-descent in the identical setting.
items.capZh: (b) 样本级非单调性。测试损失（每词困惑度）作为训练样本数量的函数，针对两个在IWSLT'14上训练到完成的Transformer模型。对于两种模型大小，都存在一个区域，其中更多样本会损害性能。与图3（相同设置下的模型级双重下降）对比。

items.en: These twin effects are shown in Figure 11(a). Note that there is a range of model sizes where the effects “cancel out”—and having 4×4\times more train samples does not help test performance when training to completion. Outside the critically-parameterized regime, for sufficiently under- or over-parameterized models, having more samples helps. This phenomenon is corroborated in Figure 12, which shows test error as a function of both model and sample size, in the same setting as Figure 11(a).
items.zh: 这两种效应如图11(a)所示。注意，存在一个模型大小范围，其中效应“相互抵消”——拥有4×更多训练样本在训练到完成时无助于测试性能。在临界参数化区域之外，对于充分欠参数化或过参数化的模型，更多样本有帮助。这一现象在图12中得到证实，该图显示了与图11(a)相同设置下，测试误差随模型和样本大小的变化。

items.capEn: Figure 12: Left: Test Error as a function of model size and number of train samples, for 5-layer CNNs on CIFAR-10 + 20% noise. Note the ridge of high test error again lies along the interpolation threshold. Right: Three slices of the left plot, showing the effect of more data for models of different sizes. Note that, when training to completion, more data helps for small and large models, but does not help for near-critically-parameterized models (green).
items.capZh: 图12：左图：CIFAR-10 + 20%噪声上5层CNN的测试误差随模型大小和训练样本数量的变化。注意高测试误差的脊线再次沿插值阈值分布。右图：左图的三个切片，显示不同大小模型下更多数据的影响。注意，当训练到完成时，更多数据对小模型和大模型有帮助，但对接近临界参数化的模型（绿色）无帮助。

items.en: In some settings, these two effects combine to yield a regime of model sizes where more data actually hurts test performance as in Figure 3 (see also Figure 11(b)). Note that this phenomenon is not unique to DNNs: more data can hurt even for linear models (see Appendix D).
items.zh: 在某些设置中，这两种效应结合导致一个模型大小区域，其中更多数据实际上损害测试性能，如图3所示（另见图11(b)）。注意，这一现象并非深度神经网络独有：更多数据甚至可能损害线性模型（见附录D）。

items.en: We introduce a generalized double descent hypothesis: models and training procedures exhibit atypical behavior when their Effective Model Complexity is comparable to the number of train samples. We provide extensive evidence for our hypothesis in modern deep learning settings, and show that it is robust to choices of dataset, architecture, and training procedures. In particular, we demonstrate “model-wise double descent” for modern deep networks and characterize the regime where bigger models can perform worse. We also demonstrate “epoch-wise double descent,” which, to the best of our knowledge, has not been previously proposed. Finally, we show that the double descent phenomenon can lead to a regime where training on more data leads to worse test performance. Preliminary results suggest that double descent also holds as we vary the amount of regularization for a fixed model (see Figure 22).
items.zh: 我们提出一个广义双重下降假设：当模型和训练过程的有效模型复杂度与训练样本数量相当时，它们会表现出非典型行为。我们在现代深度学习设置中为我们的假设提供了广泛证据，并表明它对数据集、架构和训练过程的选择具有鲁棒性。特别地，我们展示了现代深度网络的“模型级双重下降”，并刻画了更大模型可能表现更差的区域。我们还展示了“逐轮双重下降”，据我们所知，这此前未被提出。最后，我们表明双重下降现象可能导致一个区域，其中训练更多数据会导致更差的测试性能。初步结果表明，当固定模型改变正则化量时，双重下降也成立（见图22）。

items.en: We also believe our characterization of the critical regime provides a useful way of thinking for practitioners—if a model and training procedure are just barely able to fit the train set, then small changes to the model or training procedure may yield unexpected behavior (e.g. making the model slightly larger or smaller, changing regularization, etc. may hurt test performance).
items.zh: 我们还相信，我们对临界状态的刻画为实践者提供了一种有用的思考方式——如果模型和训练过程刚好能拟合训练集，那么对模型或训练过程的微小改变可能导致意外行为（例如，使模型稍大或稍小、改变正则化等可能会损害测试性能）。

items.en: We note that many of the phenomena that we highlight often do not occur with optimal early-stopping. However, this is consistent with our generalized double descent hypothesis: if early stopping prevents models from reaching 00 train error then we would not expect to see double-descent, since the EMC does not reach the number of train samples. Further, we show at least one setting where model-wise double descent can still occur even with optimal early stopping (ResNets on CIFAR-100 with no label noise, see Figure 19). We have not observed settings where more data hurts when optimal early-stopping is used. However, we are not aware of reasons which preclude this from occurring. We leave fully understanding the optimal early stopping behavior of double descent as an important open question for future work.
items.zh: 我们注意到，我们强调的许多现象在最优提前停止时通常不会发生。然而，这与我们的广义双重下降假设一致：如果提前停止阻止模型达到0训练误差，那么我们就不会看到双重下降，因为EMC未达到训练样本数量。此外，我们展示了至少一种设置，其中即使使用最优提前停止，模型级双重下降仍然会发生（CIFAR-100上无标签噪声的ResNet，见图19）。我们尚未观察到使用最优提前停止时更多数据有害的设置。然而，我们并不清楚阻止这种情况发生的理由。将完全理解双重下降的最优提前停止行为留作未来工作的重要开放问题。

items.en: In our experiments, we observe double descent most strongly in settings with label noise. However, we believe this effect is not fundamentally about label noise, but rather about model mis-specification. For example, consider a setting where the label noise is not truly random, but rather pseudorandom (with respect to the family of classifiers being trained). In this setting, the performance of the Bayes optimal classifier would not change (since the pseudorandom noise is deterministic, and invertible), but we would observe an identical double descent as with truly random label noise. Thus, we view adding label noise as merely a proxy for making distributions “harder”— i.e. increasing the amount of model mis-specification.
items.zh: 在我们的实验中，我们在有标签噪声的设置中观察到最强的双重下降。然而，我们认为这一效应从根本上并非关于标签噪声，而是关于模型误设。例如，考虑一个设置，其中标签噪声并非真正随机，而是伪随机（相对于正在训练的分类器族）。在此设置中，贝叶斯最优分类器的性能不会改变（因为伪随机噪声是确定性的且可逆），但我们会观察到与真正随机标签噪声相同的双重下降。因此，我们将添加标签噪声视为使分布“更难”的代理——即增加模型误设的程度。

items.en: Our notion of Effective Model Complexity is related to classical complexity notions such as Rademacher complexity, but differs in several crucial ways: (1) EMC depends on the true labels of the data distribution, and (2) EMC depends on the training procedure, not just the model architecture.
items.zh: 我们的有效模型复杂度概念与经典复杂度概念（如Rademacher复杂度）相关，但在几个关键方面有所不同：（1）EMC依赖于数据分布的真实标签，（2）EMC依赖于训练过程，而不仅仅是模型架构。

items.en: Other notions of model complexity which do not incorporate features (1) and (2) would not suffice to characterize the location of the double-descent peak. Rademacher complexity, for example, is determined by the ability of a model architecture to fit a randomly-labeled train set. But Rademacher complexity and VC dimension are both insufficient to determine the model-wise double descent peak location, since they do not depend on the distribution of labels— and our experiments show that adding label noise shifts the location of the peak.
items.zh: 其他不包含特征（1）和（2）的模型复杂度概念不足以刻画双重下降峰值的位置。例如，Rademacher复杂度由模型架构拟合随机标签训练集的能力决定。但Rademacher复杂度和VC维都不足以确定模型级双重下降峰值位置，因为它们不依赖于标签分布——我们的实验表明，添加标签噪声会移动峰值位置。

items.en: Moreover, both Rademacher complexity and VC dimension depend only on the model family and data distribution, and not on the training procedure used to find models. Thus, they are not capable of capturing train-time double-descent effects, such as “epoch-wise” double descent, and the effect of data-augmentation on the peak location.
items.zh: 此外，Rademacher复杂度和VC维仅依赖于模型族和数据分布，而不依赖于用于寻找模型的训练过程。因此，它们无法捕捉训练时的双下降效应，例如“逐轮”双下降，以及数据增强对峰值位置的影响。

items.en: We thank Mikhail Belkin for extremely useful discussions in the early stages of this work. We thank Christopher Olah for suggesting the Model Size ×\times Epoch visualization, which led to the investigation of epoch-wise double descent, as well as for useful discussion and feedback. We also thank Alec Radford, Jacob Steinhardt, and Vaishaal Shankar for helpful discussion and suggestions. P.N. thanks OpenAI, the Simons Institute, and the Harvard Theory Group for a research environment that enabled this kind of work.
items.zh: 我们感谢Mikhail Belkin在本工作早期阶段进行的极其有益的讨论。我们感谢Christopher Olah建议使用模型大小×轮次可视化，这引导了对逐轮双下降的研究，同时也感谢他的有益讨论和反馈。我们还感谢Alec Radford、Jacob Steinhardt和Vaishaal Shankar的有益讨论和建议。P.N.感谢OpenAI、Simons研究所和哈佛理论组提供了能够开展此类工作的研究环境。

items.en: We thank Dimitris Kalimeris, Benjamin L. Edelman, and Sharon Qian, and Aditya Ramesh for comments on an early draft of this work.
items.zh: 我们感谢Dimitris Kalimeris、Benjamin L. Edelman、Sharon Qian和Aditya Ramesh对本工作早期草稿的评论。

items.en: This work supported in part by NSF grant CAREER CCF 1452961, BSF grant 2014389, NSF USICCS proposal 1540428, a Google Research award, a Facebook research award, a Simons Investigator Award, a Simons Investigator Fellowship, and NSF Awards CCF 1715187, CCF 1565264, CCF 1301976, IIS 1409097, and CNS 1618026. Y.B. would like to thank the MIT-IBM Watson AI Lab for contributing computational resources for experiments.
items.zh: 本工作部分得到了NSF基金CAREER CCF 1452961、BSF基金2014389、NSF USICCS提案1540428、谷歌研究奖、Facebook研究奖、Simons研究员奖、Simons研究员奖学金以及NSF奖项CCF 1715187、CCF 1565264、CCF 1301976、IIS 1409097和CNS 1618026的支持。Y.B.感谢MIT-IBM Watson AI实验室为实验提供计算资源。
